# Strait UI

> Strait UI (@strait/ui) is a React + Tailwind v4 design system of 120+ accessible components built on Base UI primitives. Every component ships as its own tree-shakeable subpath export, is styled with semantic design tokens and class-variance-authority recipes, and exposes a named `*Props` type. Components render a polymorphic root via the Base UI `render` prop and tag their parts with `data-slot` attributes for styling and testing.

## Actions

- [Button](@strait/ui/components/button): The primary interactive control for actions and navigation.
- [Button Group](@strait/ui/components/button-group): A toolbar-style container that fuses a set of related controls into a single visual unit.
- [Copy Button](@strait/ui/components/copy-button): Icon button that copies a string to the clipboard and shows a transient checkmark as confirmation.
- [Kbd](@strait/ui/components/kbd): Renders a single keyboard key badge using the semantic `<kbd>` element.
- [Toggle](@strait/ui/components/toggle): A two-state button that toggles between pressed and unpressed.
- [Toggle Group](@strait/ui/components/toggle-group): A managed group of ToggleGroupItem controls, handling single or multiple selection and keyboard navigation.

## Forms

- [Calendar](@strait/ui/components/calendar): A styled date-picker calendar built on top of `react-day-picker`'s `DayPicker`.
- [Checkbox](@strait/ui/components/checkbox): A binary toggle control that indicates a checked or unchecked state.
- [Combobox](@strait/ui/components/combobox): A badge representing one selected value inside ComboboxChips.
- [Field](@strait/ui/components/field): Single form field: associates a label, control, description, and error.
- [File Upload](@strait/ui/components/file-upload): A drag-and-drop file upload zone with an optional file browser trigger.
- [Form](@strait/ui/components/form): Root provider for a `@tanstack/react-form` managed form.
- [Input](@strait/ui/components/input): A single-line text control for user input.
- [Input Group](@strait/ui/components/input-group): A composite control that visually merges an input (or textarea) with leading/trailing addons, icons, buttons, or labels into a single bordered group.
- [Label](@strait/ui/components/label): Accessible label for a form control.
- [MultiSelect](@strait/ui/components/multiselect): A multi-value combobox that lets users select (and optionally create) multiple options from a searchable dropdown list.
- [Native Select](@strait/ui/components/native-select): A styled wrapper around the native `<select>` element.
- [Radio Group](@strait/ui/components/radio-group): A group of mutually exclusive radio options.
- [Rating](@strait/ui/components/rating): A star rating input that supports controlled, uncontrolled, read-only, and disabled modes.
- [Secret Input](@strait/ui/components/secret-input): A controlled text input purpose-built for secrets and API keys.
- [Select](@strait/ui/components/select): Accessible single-value dropdown built on Base UI's `Select` primitive.
- [Select Native](@strait/ui/components/select-native): Styled wrapper around the browser's native `<select>` element.
- [Slider](@strait/ui/components/slider): A range-input control for selecting a numeric value (or range of values) by dragging one or more thumbs along a track.
- [Switch](@strait/ui/components/switch): A toggle control that switches between on and off states.
- [Textarea](@strait/ui/components/textarea): A multi-line text control for longer user input.

## Data Display

- [Activity Feed](@strait/ui/components/activity-feed): A presentational, scrollable list of timestamped activity entries with status dots and relative times.
- [AspectRatio](@strait/ui/components/aspect-ratio): Container that enforces a fixed width-to-height ratio on its content.
- [Avatar](@strait/ui/components/avatar): Rounded user-identity image with automatic fallback text.
- [Badge](@strait/ui/components/badge): Small status label used to categorise, tag, or annotate content.
- [Bar List](@strait/ui/components/bar-list): A horizontal ranked bar list — labels overlaid on value-proportional bars, with the formatted value in a trailing column.
- [Bulk Action Bar](@strait/ui/components/bulk-action-bar): Floating toolbar that appears when one or more table / list rows are selected, exposing bulk actions and a way to clear the selection.
- [Card](@strait/ui/components/card): A surface that groups related content and actions into a bordered container.
- [Carousel](@strait/ui/components/carousel): Accessible, touch-friendly carousel built on Embla Carousel.
- [Charts](@strait/ui/components/charts): Config-driven multi-series area chart.
- [Code Block](@strait/ui/components/code-block): Read-only code display surface with Shiki-powered syntax highlighting, an optional language label, line numbers, and a clipboard copy button.
- [Code Block Command](@strait/ui/components/code-block-command): A package-manager command block with tabs for npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun, a copy button that copies the active manager's command, and persistent manager selection via `localStorage`.
- [Config Row](@strait/ui/components/config-row): A single label/value row for settings panels, detail drawers, and info grids.
- [DataTable](@strait/ui/components/data-table): A fully-featured data table built on TanStack Table v8.
- [Description List](@strait/ui/components/description-list): Semantic description list root (`<dl>`). Compose with DescriptionTerm and DescriptionDetails to build accessible key–value displays.
- [Execution Trace Bar](@strait/ui/components/execution-trace-bar): Horizontal stacked proportional bar that visualises time or value breakdown across labelled segments, with per-segment tooltips and an optional legend.
- [Filter](@strait/ui/components/filter): Renders just the active filter chips (no "Add filter" trigger).
- [Item](@strait/ui/components/item): Flexible row-level container for list entries, menu rows, or card-like tiles in an ItemGroup.
- [JSON Viewer](@strait/ui/components/json-viewer): Hand-rolled recursive, collapsible, colorised JSON tree viewer.
- [Leaderboard](@strait/ui/components/leaderboard): Root of a Leaderboard. A vertical stack of ranked rows, each with a value-proportional fill bar behind its label.
- [Metric Card](@strait/ui/components/metric-card): Self-contained metric summary card with an optional delta indicator and sparkline.
- [QR Code](@strait/ui/components/qr-code): Root component that renders an SVG QR code and provides context to all child sub-components.
- [Radial Gauge](@strait/ui/components/radial-gauge): Circular radial-bar gauge that fills proportionally to a `value / max` ratio.
- [Relative Time Card](@strait/ui/components/relative-time-card): Shows a compact, formatted timestamp that — on hover — reveals a card with the live relative time and the same instant rendered across one or more timezones (plus the viewer's local zone).
- [Status Badge](@strait/ui/components/status-badge): A Badge that maps an orchestration status keyword to a consistent colour, a leading status dot, and a humanised label.
- [Table](@strait/ui/components/table): Responsive data table with a horizontally scrollable container.
- [Tag Group](@strait/ui/components/tag-group): An accessible group container for a set of selectable or removable tags.
- [Timeline](@strait/ui/components/timeline): Stepped progress tracker that renders a sequence of labeled events.
- [Tracker](@strait/ui/components/tracker): A compact status timeline — a row of small colored blocks, each with an optional hover tooltip. Ideal for uptime, build history, or any per-period status strip (à la a status-page incident bar).
- [Tree](@strait/ui/components/tree): A hierarchical tree view for displaying nested data with support for keyboard navigation, single/multiple selection, and expand/collapse.

## Navigation

- [Breadcrumb](@strait/ui/components/breadcrumb): Accessible navigation landmark that shows the user's location in the site hierarchy.
- [Command](@strait/ui/components/command): A keyboard-navigable command palette built on the `cmdk` primitive.
- [Command Menu](@strait/ui/components/command-menu): A ⌘K command palette that combines the design-system CommandDialog with a global hotkey from `react-hotkeys-hook`.
- [Menubar](@strait/ui/components/menubar): A horizontal bar of labeled menu triggers, each opening a dropdown panel.
- [NavigationMenu](@strait/ui/components/navigation-menu): Horizontal navigation bar with flyout content panels.
- [NavigationRail](@strait/ui/components/navigation-rail): A fixed-width vertical nav column that holds icon-only navigation items.
- [Pagination](@strait/ui/components/pagination): Accessible navigation landmark for moving between pages of content.
- [Sidebar](@strait/ui/components/sidebar): The sidebar panel itself — a collapsible column rendered inside a SidebarProvider.
- [Stepper](@strait/ui/components/stepper): A multi-step progress indicator that tracks which step is currently active.
- [Tabs](@strait/ui/components/tabs): Layered content panel controlled by a row (or column) of tab buttons.

## Overlays

- [Alert Dialog](@strait/ui/components/alert-dialog): Blocking confirmation dialog that requires the user to make a choice before continuing.
- [Context Menu](@strait/ui/components/context-menu): Right-click (or long-press) contextual menu anchored to an arbitrary region of the page.
- [Detail Sheet](@strait/ui/components/detail-sheet): A right-anchored (by default) detail / inspection panel built as a structured recipe over the design-system Sheet.
- [Dialog](@strait/ui/components/dialog): Modal overlay that interrupts the user to focus on a single task or message.
- [Drawer](@strait/ui/components/drawer): Edge-anchored panel that slides in from any side of the viewport, powered by the Vaul library.
- [Dropdown Menu](@strait/ui/components/dropdown-menu): Floating list of actions that opens from a trigger button.
- [Hover Card](@strait/ui/components/hover-card): Floating preview panel that appears on hover, built on Base UI's `PreviewCard` primitive.
- [Popover](@strait/ui/components/popover): Floating panel anchored to a trigger element for rich non-modal content.
- [Sheet](@strait/ui/components/sheet): Edge-anchored sliding panel built on Base UI's Dialog primitive.
- [Tooltip](@strait/ui/components/tooltip): Short, non-interactive label that appears near an element on hover or focus, built on Base UI's `Tooltip` primitive.

## Feedback

- [Alert](@strait/ui/components/alert): Inline feedback banner for status messages, warnings, and errors.
- [Banner](@strait/ui/components/banner): Root container for the composable Banner.
- [Chart Empty State](@strait/ui/components/chart-empty-state): Centered empty state for charts and data panels that have no content.
- [Empty](@strait/ui/components/empty): Centred placeholder surface shown when a list or view has no content.
- [Feature Lock](@strait/ui/components/feature-lock): Gating overlay that visually locks content behind an upsell prompt.
- [Notice Banner](@strait/ui/components/notice-banner): Thin re-export shim — all logic now lives in /banner.
- [Progress](@strait/ui/components/progress): Determinate progress bar that displays a numeric completion percentage.
- [Skeleton](@strait/ui/components/skeleton): Pulsing placeholder used while content is loading.
- [Spinner](@strait/ui/components/spinner): Animated loading indicator built on the HugeIcons `Loading03` glyph.

## Layout

- [Accordion](@strait/ui/components/accordion): A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections, each with a trigger and an animated content panel.
- [Collapsible](@strait/ui/components/collapsible): A lightweight single-panel show/hide container driven by a trigger.
- [Resizable](@strait/ui/components/resizable): Drag handle separator between two ResizablePanel elements.
- [Scroll Area](@strait/ui/components/scroll-area): A cross-browser custom scroll container with styled overlaid scrollbars.
- [Separator](@strait/ui/components/separator): A thin dividing line between sections of content.
- [Shell](@strait/ui/components/shell): Top-level page layout wrapper that applies consistent padding, gap, and flex-column structure to a page or route section.

## Patterns

- [Calendar RAC](@strait/ui/components/calendar-rac): Single-date calendar built on React Aria Components.
- [Calendar With Presets](@strait/ui/components/calendar-with-presets): A day-picker calendar with a sidebar of quick-select presets.
- [Card Checkbox](@strait/ui/components/card-checkbox): Grid wrapper that spaces a collection of CardCheckboxItem components with a consistent gap.
- [Checkbox Tree](@strait/ui/components/checkbox-tree): A headless, renderless checkbox tree that manages tri-state (checked / unchecked / indeterminate) selection across a nested TreeNode hierarchy.
- [Credenza](@strait/ui/components/credenza): Responsive overlay that renders as a centred Dialog on desktop (`>= 768 px`) and as a bottom Drawer on mobile.
- [Date Field RAC](@strait/ui/components/datefield-rac): An accessible date field that renders each date part (year, month, day) as individually focusable, spinnable segments.
- [Date Input](@strait/ui/components/date-input): A three-segment MM/DD/YYYY inline date editor with keyboard navigation.
- [Date Picker](@strait/ui/components/date-picker): A single-date picker that reveals a calendar in a popover.
- [Date Picker With Month Year](@strait/ui/components/date-picker-with-month-year): A date picker with dropdown selectors for month and year navigation.
- [Date Range Picker](@strait/ui/components/date-range-picker): An inline date-range picker composed from React Aria Components primitives.
- [Date Range Picker With Presets](@strait/ui/components/date-range-picker-with-presets): A date-range picker with a preset sidebar and an explicit apply/reset flow.
- [ID Cell](@strait/ui/components/id-cell): Table cell that displays a truncated identifier with a copy-to-clipboard button, intended for use inside a data table column definition.
- [Input OTP](@strait/ui/components/input-otp): One-time-password input that renders a fixed-length sequence of digit slots driven by the `input-otp` library.
- [Input Password with Strength Indicator](@strait/ui/components/input-password-with-strength-indicator): A password field that reveals a live strength meter and per-requirement checklist after the user first focuses the input.
- [Input with Addons](@strait/ui/components/input-with-addons): A text input flanked by optional muted addon panels for contextual prefix or suffix labels (e.g. protocol, domain extension, or unit).
- [Input with Inline Button](@strait/ui/components/input-with-inline-button): A text input with an attached button fused to its trailing edge, suitable for search bars, coupon fields, and newsletter sign-ups.
- [Input with Inner Tags](@strait/ui/components/input-with-inner-tags): A tag-input field that renders inline Tag badges inside the input area, letting users build a list of values within a single control.
- [Input with Loader](@strait/ui/components/input-with-loader): A text input that swaps its leading icon for an animated loading spinner while an async operation is in progress.
- [Input with Show/Hide Password](@strait/ui/components/input-with-show-hide-password): A minimal password field with a trailing eye-icon toggle that switches the input between masked (`"password"`) and revealed (`"text"`) mode.
- [Input with Start Icon](@strait/ui/components/input-with-start-icon): A text input with a decorative, non-interactive icon pinned to the leading edge — the standard pattern for search bars and filtered inputs.
- [Number Input Percentage with Chevrons](@strait/ui/components/number-input-percentage-with-chevrons): A percentage number input (0–100 %) with stacked up/down chevron buttons, formatted with React Aria's `NumberField`.
- [Number Input with Buttons](@strait/ui/components/number-input-with-buttons): A stepper-style number input with flanking decrement (−) and increment (+) buttons rendered on the left and right edges.
- [Number Input with Chevrons](@strait/ui/components/number-input-with-chevrons): A number input with stacked up/down chevron buttons in a trailing column, supporting arbitrary `Intl.NumberFormatOptions` formatting.
- [Password Input](@strait/ui/components/password-input): A password field with an inline toggle button that reveals or masks the entered text.
- [Phone Input](@strait/ui/components/phone-input): An international phone number field composed of a flag/country-code selector and a number text input that formats as the user types.
- [Preview Card](@strait/ui/components/preview-card): A hover-activated floating card that previews rich content for a trigger element, built on Base UI's `PreviewCard` primitives.
- [Range Calendar With Presets](@strait/ui/components/range-calendar-with-presets): A range calendar with a row of quick-select preset buttons and an optional apply/reset footer.
- [Select With Search](@strait/ui/components/select-with-search): A searchable single-select dropdown that virtualizes its option list for large datasets and supports server-side pagination.
- [Select With Search And Button](@strait/ui/components/select-with-search-and-button): A searchable single-select dropdown with a persistent action button pinned below the option list, typically used for inline "Add new …" creation flows.

## Uncategorized

- [Chart](@strait/ui/components/chart): Root wrapper for the data-driven chart components.
- [direction](@strait/ui/components/direction): Re-exports Base UI's direction utilities for setting and reading the text directionality (`"ltr"` | `"rtl"`) of the component tree.
